data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Location-specific pricing (downtown premium)', but the evidence provided does not include any concrete API reads or persisted state checks that confirm this pricing structure. While the linked use case mentions a 10% higher price downtown, there are no specific details or evidence from API responses that demonstrate this pricing is implemented in the system. Therefore, the evidence is insufficient to conclude that the requirement is satisfied.
gaps: No evidence of API reads or persisted state checks confirming location-specific pricing.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
